events.content: Verified workspace existence before reading archive and hardened tar path sanitization: Verified workspace existence before reading archive and hardened tar path sanitization

raw.question: Verified workspace existence before reading archive and hardened tar path sanitization
raw.chosen: Verified workspace existence before reading archive and hardened tar path sanitization
raw.reasoning: This guarantees 404/401 responses happen before extraction and blocks parent-directory traversal that normalize() alone would miss.

retrospective.summary: Hardened the workspace fs import route with pre-extraction workspace verification, strict traversal rejection, and regression tests covering auth, nested paths, 413, invalid tar, and workspace existence ordering.
